ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "sim_number" INTEGER /* Simulation number */,
  "oxcal_target" TEXT /* Target identifier for the OxCal analysis */,
  "a_pass" TEXT /* Pass or fail status of the simulation */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets in the simulation */,
  "span" INTEGER /* Span of the simulation */,
  "samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the simulation */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors in the simulation */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset value of the simulation */,
  "offset_varia" REAL /* Offset variability of the simulation */,
  "model_run" INTEGER /* Number of model runs in the simulation */,
  "accuracy_68" INTEGER /* Accuracy at 68% confidence level */,
  "accuracy_95" INTEGER /* Accuracy at 95% confidence level */,
  "precision_68" INTEGER /* Precision at 68% confidence level */,
  "precision_95" INTEGER /* Precision at 95% confidence level */,
  "off_target_68" REAL /* Off-target value at 68% confidence level */,
  "off_target_95" REAL /* Off-target value at 95% confidence level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the simulation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "simulation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target sample */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample in milligrams */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample */,
  "sample_age" INTEGER /* Age of the sample in years */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected (including latitude and longitude) */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sim_target_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target sample */,
  "target_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the target sample was used in the simulation */,
  "target_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the target sample was used in the simulation */,
  "target_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the target sample in the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sim_target_mapping_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sim_target_mapping_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation that produced this result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Actual result data (e.g., dates, probabilities) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation that produced this error (if applicable) */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., calculation, data input) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed description of the error */,
  "error_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation that the report is based on (if applicable) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data (e.g., charts, tables) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)
